headline: Disney’s Bob Iger Era Is Over. How the Stock Did During His Time as CEO—and What’s Next.

headline: Jensen Huang Calls Robotics A '$50 Trillion Industry' As Nvidia And Disney Bring 'Frozen' Character 'Olaf' To Life At GTC 2026
summary: At GTC 2026, Jensen Huang highlighted the $50 trillion robotics opportunity while unveiling a real-world, AI-powered Olaf robot developed with The Walt Disney Company"], as NVDA shares rose 1.63% before slipping slightly in after-hours trading.
